rationale: Factual executive-appointment reporting for Gucci Racing with no evaluative verdict.
Trade press frames accelerated L'Oreal beauty-license shift as a structural bright spot, though hedged by execution risk.
Gucci named in ongoing labor-exploitation supply-chain investigation; not yet charged, so tempered magnitude.
Critical opinion piece frames Gucci as a desirability and design crisis, not just cost issue.
Independent fashion criticism calls Demna appointment controversial and questions Gucci's remaining brand foundation.
Collector forum thread leans toward quality having slipped since Tom Ford era, despite some defenders.
Forum reactions to Demna's debut are genuinely polarized between praise and criticism, no clear net direction.
AI-imagery backlash over craftsmanship claims, retained as stale background reference outside freshness window.
Reiterated 14.3 percent Q1 revenue decline with Western Europe among weakest geographies is clear negative momentum press.
Brand-owned Instagram promo continuation with no extractable engagement or third-party verdict; self-praise is not public opinion.
